title: Items Reload
body:
A small redrawing of some mods for my personal mpack on 1.16.5, I decided to post it in case anyone likes it)

- **Warp Wing** - Warp Wing
- **Traders In Disguise** - Sickle, Tribow
- **Hunter Illager** - Boomerang (to fit the Quark _pickarang_ style)
- **Kobolds** - Kobold Equipment
- **Antique Atlas** - Atlases
- **Fantasy Mounts** - Golden Whistle, Diamond Carrot, Golden Carrot Stew
- **Illage and Spillage** - Totem of Banishment
- **It Takes a Pillage** - Ravager Horn
